slides.subtitle: The 3 stories you don't want to miss. Swipe →

slides.headline: $7 AND 22 MINUTES TO BUILD A GAME
slides.subtitle: Sakana's Fugu Ultra went head to head with Claude Opus 4.8.
slides.body: Sakana's Fugu Ultra raced Claude Opus 4.8 to build a Crossy Road clone from a single prompt. Fugu finished in 22 minutes for $7.32, rough edges and all. Coding agents are now cheap enough to point at real prototypes, not just demos.

art.bg_prompt_fallback: A cinematic 3D voxel game world at night with glowing light trails, premium render, no text.

slides.headline: CLAUDE NOW LIVES IN YOUR SLACK
slides.subtitle: Anthropic's Claude Tag joins channels as a teammate, with memory.
slides.body: Anthropic launched Claude Tag: tag Claude into a channel and it works alongside the team, with its own memory and identity. The agent-as-teammate pattern just went mainstream. You can wire the same delegation flow in NickAI today.

art.bg_prompt: A realistic modern team-chat workspace on a laptop screen at night, a single warm glowing AI presence orb integrated into the conversation, soft orange accent light, cinematic photographic depth of field, no readable text.

slides.headline: ZUCKERBERG WANTS A PREDICTION MARKET
slides.subtitle: Meta is reportedly building a prediction markets app.
slides.body: Meta is reportedly building a prediction markets app, stepping into the same arena as Polymarket and Kalshi. When the biggest platforms chase real time odds, the signal is clear: live markets are becoming a data layer worth building on.

art.bg_prompt: Place this real person (keep his face and likeness exactly) center-frame, looking confident, in front of a large glowing prediction-market odds board showing probability percentages and live market candlestick graphs, cool electric-blue trading-floor lighting, cinematic editorial photograph, premium and realistic.

slides.headline: BUILD ON TODAY'S NEWS
slides.body: Every story above is a workflow you can stand up without code.

art.bg_prompt: A clean minimal dark scene of glowing modular building blocks assembling into a connected workflow graph, optimistic premium blue glow, cinematic 3D render, no text.

caption:
Three AI stories from June 23 that matter if you build:

1. Sakana's Fugu Ultra built a playable game in 22 minutes for 7 dollars, head to head with Claude Opus 4.8.
2. Claude Tag landed in Slack as a real teammate with memory.
3. Meta is reportedly building a prediction markets app.

The pattern underneath all three: agents are getting cheaper, more proactive, and pointed at live data. All of it is buildable today.

Try it for free now: getnick.ai
